analyst_briefing: All planetary boundaries hold current status: climate_change beyond_boundary with El Niño forecast (NOAA Tier 1, 61% May-July) noted as potential forcing amplifier but no status shift warranted. Other boundaries stable absent signals. All five tipping elements (AMOC, ice_sheets, permafrost, Amazon, coral) register no_signal per Tier 1 source silence (PIK/Copernicus/IPCC). Cascade detection: El Niño continuation pattern flagged for food_insecurity with SCEM/GMM relevance; matches standing ENSO watch item. Cross-monitor flags: SCEM climate-conflict nexus (MEDIUM) on food insecurity; GMM commodity disruption (MEDIUM); WDM governance stress (LOW) from US state litigation. No contested findings. Primary signal is ENSO transition positioning Q3 2026 for weather extremes; monitor subsurface anomalies for very strong event risk. Stable week overall.
